def negative_sensitive_config_key_included_in_debug_level_log_dict_dump():
    rule_id = "sensitive_config_key_included_in_debug_level_log_dict_dump"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Debug log statement dumps the full config dict including keys that may hold secrets."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
